step_rationale: Monocyte/macrophage chemokine receptor; LV infarct gene expression indicates inflammatory response post-MI.
mechanism: Chemokine-receptor mediating monocyte recruitment to the infarcted myocardium and inflammation-driven remodeling.

references.title: Identifying the molecular and cellular signature of cardiac dilation following myocardial infarction.
references.journal: Biochimica et biophysica acta. Molecular basis of disease
